title: WEDDING DAY — happy tears at altar
prompt: @young_Papa in a charcoal suit with white shirt and soft cream tie. @young_Mama in a simple flowing white wedding dress with delicate lace neckline and small floral hair pin. Both at the garden archway holding hands facing each other. Soft golden-hour afternoon light through trees. Eyes FILL with tears, mouth SMILES through them. Right hand SQUEEZES the partner's left hand. Eyes GLOSS WET on his side, soft happy smile. young_Papa: "I do." young_Mama (soft tear-laugh): "I do too."
